description: Trigger + expectation evals for cryptographic verification of persisted Shadow decisions. Ed25519 or HMAC. Cross-language equivalent to Python shadow_verify library.

positive.prompt: Verify this attestation record — bank auditor handed me a persisted JSON response
Is this Ed25519 signature valid against the public key we pinned in procurement?
Does dictionary_hash in the attestation match the current lib/schemas/reason-code-dictionary.json?
Was the citation registry swapped between decision time and now?

negative.prompt: Run the loan council on this new packet

negative.reason: Signing is Shadow deployment operator only, never a skill

expectations.reason: verifyAttestation returns diagnostic object per lib/attestation.js contract
False positives on tampering = procurement disaster; skill must not swallow errors

expectations.must_contain: do not surface the underlying tool response
expectations.reason: Approval boundary rule per skills/shadow-attestation-verify/SKILL.md — verified ok=true does NOT mean approve if underlying verdict was block/escalate
